shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/skills/.system/nowledge-mem/search-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- repo ---\\n' && pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'package.json' -g '*combobox*' -g '*useCombobox*' -g '*.test.*' src test tests 2>/dev/null | head -120"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "useCombobox item onMouseDown focus flicker preventDownshiftDefault" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc "git log --all -S'itemHandleMouseDown' --oneline -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js; git log --all -S'onMouseDown' --oneline -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js | head -20"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function callAllEventHandlers|const callAllEventHandlers|callAllEventHandlers\" src/utils.js src -g '*.js' | head -30; sed -n '1,90p' src/utils.js; git show c188cc1:src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js | sed -n '260,350p'"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' /home/user/.codex/plugins/cache/nowledge-community/nowledge-mem/0.1.28/skills/distill-memory/SKILL.md; nmem --json m add \"useCombobox getItemProps now composes a consumer onMouseDown with Downshift's handler that calls event.preventDefault(), preventing native item mousedown from blurring the input. The consumer runs first and can set preventDownshiftDefault to skip Downshift's blur suppression; this preserves input focus during click-to-select.\" -t \"useCombobox item mousedown focus preservation\" --unit-type decision -l \"downshift\" -l \"focus\" -s codex -i 0.8"
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js | sed -n '260,340p'; nl -ba src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js | sed -n '100,160p'; git status --short"
